note: Offline DCL integration scaffold composed from the physical Weapon Skill/defense mechanism, numeric magic mechanism, and live-proven Death Instant-KO mechanism. Values remain mechanism fixtures, not ratified balance policy. Death requires the paired neutralized action-data artifact. The profile intentionally excludes design-open status, reaction, broader lifecycle, item, job, and multistrike policy and must not be deployed as the final mod.

resolutions.DclDamageFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), 0), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.weaponModel, 0), if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, if(dcl.nativeHpCreditResult, dcl.magicAmount, 0), if(dcl.nativeHpDamageResult, dcl.oldDebit, 0))))

patch.DclPreviewDamageFormula: if(dcl.isMagicDamage, if(dcl.magicAbsorbed || dcl.targetNull, 0, dcl.magicAmount), if(action.type == 1 && action.abilityId == 0, dcl.weaponModel, if(dcl.isMagicHeal && t.status.undead, dcl.magicAmount, 0)))
